title: Verify successful login with a password of exactly 8 characters
description: Test the boundary condition for password length by logging in with a password that is exactly 8 characters long.
preconditions: User account exists with email 'test@example.com' and password 'password'
User is on the login page

steps.description: 2. Enter 'password' (8 characters) into the password field

expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the application's home/dashboard screen.
